title: Refactor HomePage How To Play Section to Use Accordion
description: Convert the existing How To Play section on HomePage to use the new Accordion component. Add a 'Show Rules' button that controls the accordion, with content collapsed by default.
acceptanceCriteria: How To Play section uses Accordion component
Content is collapsed by default on page load
NeonButton with 'SHOW RULES' / 'HIDE RULES' text controls accordion
Button text updates based on accordion state (open/closed)
All existing content (4 rule sections) displays correctly when expanded
Button uses appropriate neon color (purple to match section title)
Responsive layout works on all screen sizes
Animation doesn't cause layout shift in page
technicalNotes: Wrap existing GlassCard content with Accordion component
Add state to track accordion open/closed
Add NeonButton above or inside accordion header
Update button text dynamically: 'SHOW RULES' when closed, 'HIDE RULES' when open
Consider adding icon to button (chevron down/up)
Ensure section title ('HOW TO PLAY') remains visible when collapsed
Test with page scroll position to ensure smooth UX
testingStrategy: Integration tests: verify accordion integration. Visual tests: verify styling consistency. User interaction tests: click button and verify smooth animation. Responsive tests: test on multiple viewports.
rollbackPlan: Revert to static content display if accordion causes UX issues
